essence: Fabricates and assembles steel structures and components for construction and industrial projects.

identity.title: Steel Fabricator
identity.summary: Cuts, welds, and assembles steelwork to drawings, using fabrication techniques and heavy machinery to produce structural components.

salary.notes: Specialist welders and fabricators on large projects can earn higher rates.

qualifications: NVQ or apprenticeship in fabrication or welding
Experience with MIG, TIG, and arc welding
Ability to read engineering drawings and templates
Knowledge of lifting and health & safety procedures

lifestyle.description: Workshop and site work with physically demanding tasks and exposure to outdoor conditions on construction sites.

habits: Performs welding and assembly to tolerances
Inspects finished work and corrects defects
